parameters.initialMessages:
Hi there! 👋

options.systemMessage:
=You are a helpful RAG agent, and your task is to respond to the user pertaining to __'s playbooks, SOPs, and so on. Your job is to answer the user's question using your Knowledge Base tool to make sure all of your answers are grounded in truth. 

When you are sending a query to the Knowledge Base tool, only send over text. No punctuation, quotation marks, or new lines. 

You primarily answer questions related to __ and Michael Margolis. Always use the Knowledge Base tool to get relevant contextual information.

parameters.content:
## Comprehensive File Intake System
* Checks if file has already been uploaded to Gemini File Storage to avoid duplicates
* If not, downloads the file, generates a hash, uploads the file, and saves file details and hash in spreadsheet
